name: ltspice-automation
description: Create and verify constrained LTspice/ngspice transient circuits, Buck converters, waveform exports, and parameter sweeps.

interface.shortDescription: Automate verified LTspice/ngspice circuits and sweeps.
interface.longDescription: Local Codex tools for visible RC, RL, RLC, and constrained Buck schematics; LTspice and ngspice batch simulation; waveform CSV/SVG export; bounded RC and Buck parameter sweeps; engineering metrics; and PASS/FAIL reports.
defaultPrompt: Create and simulate a constrained Buck converter.
Sweep RC resistance and plot the responses.
Export this waveform to CSV with metrics.
